creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Hi Richard.

I can't reproduce this behavior:
http://pastebin.com/qnav77zS

I see that you use `portsnap fetch install`, but portsnap
doesn't have `install` target. You should use
`portsnap fetch extract` in first time and
`portsnap fetch update` to update your tree.
I'm trying this with python 2.7 on 9.0-current with no
problem. Please try this and tell us if it helped.
You can try to delete /usr/ports tree (except distfiles/
and packages/) and do `portsnap fetch extract` to make
clean experiment.


-- 
Regards,
Ruslan
